title: eMKay® Pack of 10 Pack Aluminium Foil Containers with Lids 12 x 10 Reusable Foil Trays for Food – Oven & Freezer Safe Tin Containers – For Baking, Cooking, Meal Prep, Takeaway, Storage & Catering
features: 💪 Durable Construction: Premium-grade takeaway containers with lids designed to handle even the heaviest meals without bending or crumpling—perfect for curries, stews, and hearty dishes.
🔒 Secure, Spill-Proof Lids: Equipped with snug-fitting lids that won’t pop off, these containers provide a tight seal to keep your food fresh and prevent spills during storage or transport.

🍽️ Generous Capacity: Pack of 10 takeaway containers with lids, each 32 x 26 x 6.2 cm approx, accommodating 3-4 generous servings—perfect for meal prepping large portions, freezing lasagne, casseroles, and more.
❄️🔥 Freezer-Safe and Oven-Ready: These aluminium foil trays can go directly from the freezer to the oven, making them ideal for reheating meals without any transfer, saving you time and effort.

🍲 Multi-Purpose Versatility: Perfect for meal prepping, storing leftovers, or freezing meals in advance. These sturdy tin foil trays are ideal for a wide range of dishes, from curries and casseroles to party foods, making them great for home kitchens, catering, or meal prep businesses.
📦 PACKAGING MAY VARY: Due to different production batches, packaging design may differ.
